judge_reason: Description A describes two struck-through 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps and handwritten marks, while Description B mentions typed 'A-2 COMMENT' and 'EVALUATION' sections, indicating the two descriptions are about completely different visual content.
original_image_tags: A dark, aged document page with two "CONFIDENTIAL" stamps. The top stamp is struck through with a horizontal line. The bottom stamp is also struck through. The page has two hole-punch marks on the left margin. A small handwritten number "186" appears in the upper right corner, and a small handwritten symbol appears in the lower right corner.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned archival document page with large “CONFIDENTIAL” stamps at the top and bottom, typed text headed “A-2 COMMENT,” and an “EVALUATION” section listing “Of Source C” and “Of Information 3,” with binder punch holes visible along the left margin.*
